1.gl: that, used as relative conjunction, and especially (with a preposition) in adverbial phrases; also as preposition of
1.kj: [idiom] as, but, for(-asmuch [phrase]), [phrase] now, of, seeing, than, that, therefore, until, [phrase] what (-soever), when, which, whom, whose.

1.gl: {above, over, upon, or against (yet always in this last relation with a downward aspect) in a great variety of applications}
1.kj: about, against, concerning, for, (there-) fore, from, in, [idiom] more, of, (there-, up-) on, (in-) to, [phrase] why with.

1.gl: {to prophesy, i.e. speak (or sing) by inspiration (in prediction or simple discourse) to prophesy, i.e. speak (or sing) by inspiration (in prediction or simple discourse)}
{an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character}
Iddo (or Iddi), the name of five Israelites
1.dv: or עִדּוֹא; or עִדִּיא; from H5710 (עָדָה); timely;

1.gl: Zecarjah, the name of twenty-nine Israelites

2.kj: appoint, establish, make, raise up self, (a-) rise (up), (make to) stand, set (up).

2.gl: to free, separate; figuratively, to unravel, commence; by implication (of unloading beasts) to reside
